Venturely

Plan it. Share it. Remember it.

Your private, beautifully organised space for every experience — trips, events, gatherings — with timelines, documents, photos and conversations, shared only with the people you choose.

↓  Download Free See How It Works

Experiences

Everything about your experience,
in one place.

Each Experience is a rich, living space. From the moment you plan it to the last photo taken, every detail is captured, organised, and shared with exactly the right people.

Day-by-day Timeline

Build a detailed timeline for every day of your experience. Add activities, locations, and notes so every participant knows exactly what's happening and when.

  • ✓ Activities organised by day and time
  • ✓ Locations and descriptions for each activity
  • ✓ Visible to all invited participants
  • ✓ Offline accessible, syncs automatically

Shared Photos & Albums

Create albums within each Experience. Every participant can contribute — building a rich, shared memory of the moment together, right inside the app.

  • ✓ Multiple albums per Experience
  • ✓ All participants can add photos
  • ✓ Stored securely in your iCloud database
  • ✓ Browse by album or see all photos at once

Your Private Vault

Every user has their own secure, private document vault — visible only to them. Passports, tickets, insurance — always at hand, never shared unless you choose to.

  • ✓ Completely private — not visible to other participants
  • ✓ Customisable categories (Travel, Personal, etc.)
  • ✓ Available to both Organisers and Participants
  • ✓ Stored in your personal iCloud database

Features

Built for every detail.

Venturely brings together everything you need — before, during, and after the experience.

🗓️

Experience Timeline

Day-by-day activity planning with locations, times, and notes. Your itinerary, perfectly organised.

👥

Organiser & Participants

Manage who's part of each experience. Organisers see all; participants see what's shared with them.

📄

Shared Documents

Attach documents to an experience for all participants, or assign specific docs to individual people — like their personal ticket.

📸

Photos & Albums

Create themed albums and invite everyone to contribute. Build a shared memory, together.

💬

Discussions

Group conversations within each experience. Keep all discussion contextual and connected to what matters.

🔒

Private Vault

Your own secure document store. Completely private — never visible to other participants. Organisers and Participants both have one.

📖

Organiser Address Book

Save repeat participants for future experiences. Build your network, reuse it effortlessly.

☁️

iCloud Secure Storage

All data lives in your private Apple iCloud database. Shared only with express permission via secure invitation.

📵

Works Offline

Full access to your experiences without a connection. Changes sync automatically when you're back online.

🔐

Secure by Design

Private iCloud databases. Shared only via secure Apple invitation and acceptance.

📵

Works Offline

Full access without connection. Syncs back automatically when online.

📱

Multi-Device

Same account across all your Apple devices. Changes sync in near real-time.

🛡️

Privacy First

No analytics, no advertising. Your data never touches our servers.

How It Works

Two roles. One seamless experience.

Choose your role at sign-up. Test both sides with a friend — or reach out and we'll act as your buddy.

★ Organiser

You create the experience.

Build and manage every aspect of your experiences. Full visibility and control from planning to memories.

  • ✓ Create and manage Experiences with timelines
  • ✓ Add participants from your address book
  • ✓ Assign shared and personal documents
  • ✓ Share experiences securely via Apple ID
  • ✓ Create albums, photos, and discussions
  • ✓ Private document vault
● Participant

You're part of the experience.

Accept an invitation and instantly see the timeline, documents, and people for that experience. Add photos, join conversations.

  • ✓ Accept invitations to shared experiences
  • ✓ View timeline, people, and shared documents
  • ✓ See documents assigned specifically to you
  • ✓ Add photos, albums, and comments
  • ✓ Private document vault
  • ✓ Offline access, automatic sync

Who It's For

Built for every kind of adventure.

Whether you're a professional organiser or planning a family weekend away — Venturely was made for you.

✈️

Travel Agents & Tour Operators

Manage itineraries, documents, and participant groups across multiple tours — all in one secure place.

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

Families

Co-ordinate holidays, evenings out, and adventures with tickets, bookings, and plans everyone can access instantly.

🎿

Sports & Adventure Groups

Ski trips, cycling tours, sporting events — keep your group informed and organised from start to finish.

🎤

Event Organisers

Conferences, gatherings, and group events managed with precision and shared with exactly the right people.

Pricing

Simple, transparent pricing.

Start free. Scale when you need to. All plans include secure iCloud storage, offline access, and multi-device sync.
